description:
## Background

`bsm-kia.12` requires a final contract step once every consumer
has migrated. Until the raw env-var reads are deleted everywhere
they live, dead code lingers and future specs could copy the old
shape. This sub-issue removes the old form and proves its absence
with a `rg` acceptance check.

## What to build

Final delete-and-verify pass: prove that no spec or wdio config
reads `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` directly anymore. The typed
parser is the only consumer-side surface.

## Technical Approach

- Confirm every migrate sub-issue (`bsm-kia.12.2`,
  `bsm-kia.12.3`, `bsm-kia.12.4`) has landed.
- Run
  `rg "process\.env\.BEADSMITH_E2E_" wdio.issue-list.conf.ts e2e/issue-list/`
  and confirm zero hits in spec files and the wdio config. The
  launcher (`run-scenario.ts`) is allowed to keep its env
  producer reads.
- If the helper module still exports a temporary compatibility
  shim, delete it.
- Update any non-spec file that still imports the raw env reads
  (e.g., a top-level helper that pre-dates this epic).

## Considerations

- This sub-issue is intentionally tiny: it must be a single
  deletion + verification commit, not a refactor.
- The launcher remains the only env producer; do not change the
  env vars it exports.
- If the contract step requires a non-trivial cleanup (e.g., a
  rename or signature change), split it further rather than
  blending with the contract.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `rg "process\.env\.BEADSMITH_E2E_" wdio.issue-list.conf.ts e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits.
- [ ] No spec file or `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts` reads
      `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` directly.
- [ ] `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
      `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` pass.
- [ ] No dead exports or dead imports remain in any spec or
      wdio config.

## Test Plan

- Run `pnpm exec ultracite check`, `pnpm test`, and
  `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` — all must pass.
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
  `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` to prove no behavioral
  regression.
- Inspect the final diff: every spec file and
  `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts` reads harness inputs only through
  the typed parser.
title: Contract: delete raw env reads from specs and wdio config
